reviews.review_title: Very nice. Ending nearly made me cry
reviews.review_description: Very nice short story. No gameplay but relaxing and chill. And the ending nearly made me cry.
This was really good. It was sad. It could have been a little longer. Its a good short film.
Best movie on Quest 3
I was wanting a game- not a game. Cute story. Would I buy again- no

Yep it do not have to be always games in VR this is a great example of a story telling in VR.
best experiencing it standing with some place around you to follow the animation around you and flying up or down its 3D so you can walk around it to see it from another side ;-))

One of the better, and longer VR animated shorts.
I wish there were more of this length and quality.

This is a movie with zero interaction.
As for a movie it’s pretty good, i didn’t exactly enjoy having to sit on a spinning chair to enjoy it, i’d like to have a mode where it centers the view for you so if you plan on getting it play it in a place where you can spin in your own axis, it’s clearly made for Quest 2 so it’s pixelated but it doesn’t deter from the experience, the movie is actually good like real good, the ending hits hard and i love the ending phrase, i actually loved it and i highly recommend it.
got this on sale, its enjoyable enough to watch but not at the list price
This is not a game in any way.  It's an animated adventure that is best watched on a chair/stool that turns 360°. I very much enjoyed.
Wow
Downloaded this thinking it was zombie game but it’s just a short dark video.
This is not a game. If you like a story that is what this is so buyer beware. Not worth it, do not recommend.

I thought it was a game, but it's a movie. It's a beautiful little movie with alot of emotion.  I loved it so much and do not regret buying it. It made me tear up. Would watch it again and do recommend.

reviews.review_title: Is there a way we can return this?
reviews.review_description: Me and my cousin thought this was a game u can play and we spent our money for no reason is there a way where we can return this?
Very average story. Didn't see a reason this has to be in vr. And there's no way to change the angles. You have to constantly spin around to see the story for no good reason.

It's a half hour VR movie split into three parts (so you can pause and take a break). The whole thing is very Burton-esque, and the story straddles cute and creepy well; even if it's hampered a little by being told visually with a single narrator. 

Saying that, the narration from Colin Farrell is excellent and there are some clever uses of VR as a storytelling medium. The way the film shifts your attention from scene to scene all around you is particularly enthralling.

If you'd pay the price for an episode of a show you enjoy, take the plunge. Supporting entertainment like this that is written for VR can only help the medium grow. If you'd rather stick to free stuff think about something like 'Dear Angelica'.

It would probably get a 4 or 5 stars.
It seems like a wonderful idea and is quite amazing for what I've seen of it, it has a simple story but the depth added by VR makes up for it.
It gives me hope that more main stream cinema will approach VR with the same inspiration. Hopefully an update will be pushed and chapters 2 and 3 will be functional so I can see how the story ends.

It's a fun story but for me it was all just a bit too dark as in the lighting made it hard to see.  Also the size of the characters and set made seeing them difficult too - they looked miniature.  I was expecting something that was more full sized so it was a little disappointing to find it was scaled down so much.  The sun was  great character though and because he was bigger he was much easier to see.  I'm glad i purchased this because i want to encourage more of these VR films, i think they have great potential and i appreciate we're probably at the start of this type of media.  I think it will get better and more interesting as time goes by.

From a technical side, outstanding, the animation along with the 2D and 3D rendering makes you feel as if the story is physical occurring right in front of you in a way no other story driven “game” has done from what I’ve experienced. Colin Farrell narration is perfect for the offbeat story and fits the story rather well. Although there are no words spoken the emotions of each character is perfecting drawn and render that you understand what each person is feeling whether it be a good or bad emotion. The overall story leads you to hope that what the two main characters have you will one day have yourself.
It’s like you are sitting and watching a puppet show going all around you. It’s dark, but beautiful 🙏🏻 Second chapter was something 😍 Looking forward to more stories like this!
Love the story and animation. Make sure your standing to watch this or in a swivel chair.
That is blood on her right?

The new update rendered the app useless...it just sits on the load screen. 5 star app if it worked!!!
Edit: Raised rating to 3 stars due to quick developer response, will update to 5 when all is working. Thanks devs!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for warning us, the problem has been identified and a fix is underway! We apologize for this inconvenience. You will soon be able to enjoy Gloomy Eyes.

reviews.review_description: AMAZING !!!! ITS TOTALY A ONE OF A KIND AND it don't matter how old U are this is spectacular !!!and truly an experience I want to share with my friends !!Thanx Collin u did a Fantastic Job!!!

reviews.review_title: I hope to see more like this
reviews.review_description: It's not a game. It's a movie. Really cool animation! Pro tip, watch it while in a swivel chair

I enjoyed this sooo much. My 8 year old niece was moved to tears by this story. It was wonderful to share this with her. I really want more stories to be presented this way. I can’t wait for the next one!

I usually appreciate a good story, but I couldn't get into this one.  The opening scene runs at least 15 minutes, and within that opening segment, it changes the perspective awkwardly and without notice or reason. 
The first impression alone seemed awkward and drawn out and ready to set this one down.
Love using this to show people the depth of the VR. Beautiful story and stunning miniature animation...simple yet stunning..great Job 👍
Great story, visuals, camera angles! There is nothing bad i can say about Gloomy Eyes.
It is a GREAT game (it’s more like a movie) you don’t get to do much but watch but I still LOVE it. It has so much story and great characters.  5/5
Sadly can't get chapter 2 to work.

developer_response.body: Hi Harry_O! Thanks for reviewing Gloomy Eyes. Dev team is aware of that issue and we'll be pushing a new update very soon, stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
For those who love Tim Burton Animation Movies.

It's one of those many little VR experiences, many are fascinating. This one comes in 3 Chapters and it's a more gloomy experience. It's for people love movies like "Nightmare Before Christmas" and co. Like me. I was quite fascinated by the Narrative and Animations. 

So it's maybe not for everyone. There is also no interaction. It's a VR Movie, it's possible to walk around and look into things closer and from all angles, but that's it.

reviews.review_title: A Clever, if odd, little story
reviews.review_description:
The animation in this is great, and it certainly demonstrates some of the creative uses of vr. I enjoyed the story, although to be honest I can't claim to understand the ending. It's brief, but fun. 

The narrator is perfect as well, with a great voice and perfect inflection.
Such a beautiful story and beautifully animated! I watched it, then I had my two kids watch it too.
I thought I was getting a game, but was pleasantly surprised at the great job these guys did with this. Worth it.
I wasn’t sure because of all the mixed reviews but I thought it would maybe feel immersive, let me tell you its not. Major disappoint and a waste of money
Very cute story.. Either stand or use a chair with wheels because you have to keep turning around.

reviews.review_title: What cinematic VR should be aiming for!
reviews.review_description: This is what cinematic VR should be aiming for. Animated, dark- magical, wow, wow, wow!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much fro sharing randy.squillace! This is why we do what we do :)

reviews.review_description: Honestly want to return it I just don’t know how
I liked it a lot but it needs to give us subtitle or fix the commentary sound coz it's really low specially when there is other sounds in the story
